title: now-sdk Configuration
description: Configuration for ServiceNow SDK (now-sdk) scoped application projects.

scope.description: Application scope prefix (e.g., x_snc_example). Must match the sys_app scope on the target instance.

scopeId.description: sys_id of the sys_app record on the target instance. Obtain from the instance after first deploy or from an existing app.

name.description: Display name of the application as it appears in ServiceNow.

tsconfigPath.description: Relative path to the TypeScript configuration for server-side code compilation.
